title.en: Extract logger station time series from NetCDF (THREDDS) to CSV

description.en: Extract environmental time series from a THREDDS-hosted logger NetCDF dataset. Optional filters: parameters and date interval. Outputs a CSV (logger.csv).

links.title: GitHub repo of NIVA AquaINFRA tools

url_thredds.title: url_thredds
url_thredds.description: THREDDS/OPeNDAP URL to the logger NetCDF dataset (e.g. .../baterod.nc).

parameters.title: parameters
parameters.description: Optional list of parameters to extract. If omitted or empty, all available parameters are extracted.

start_date.title: start_date
start_date.description: Optional start date (YYYY-MM-DD). If provided, end_date must also be provided.

end_date.title: end_date
end_date.description: Optional end date (YYYY-MM-DD). If provided, start_date must also be provided.
